configurePresets.name: ccache
configurePresets.description: Opt-in compiler cache. Not part of dev/release because ccache isn't guaranteed on every machine (and MSVC needs extra setup). Enable it from your machine-local CMakeUserPresets.json: { "name": "my-dev", "inherits": ["dev", "ccache"] }.

configurePresets.name: dev
configurePresets.description: The documented daily-driver preset (README: cmake --preset=dev), portable across GCC/Clang/MSVC — each compiler keeps its own default Debug flags. On Windows run from a 'x64 Native Tools for VS 2022' prompt, or let VS Code's CMake Tools supply the MSVC kit. Historical note: ASan (-fsanitize=address) was removed here — it deadlocks on macOS 26.1+ (Xcode 26.1+); re-add locally when Apple fixes the ASan/dyld interaction bug. CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE is kept for configure-time gates even though the multi-config generator ignores it at compile time.

configurePresets.name: release
configurePresets.description: Optimized build with each compiler's default Release flags (-O3 -DNDEBUG on GCC/Clang, /O2 on MSVC).

configurePresets.name: windows-vs
configurePresets.description: MSVC via the Visual Studio generator. Produces Atmospheric.sln in build/ — open it in Visual Studio and F5 to build + debug. Uses the bundled vcpkg toolchain. For CLI/VS Code builds on Windows, prefer the cross-platform 'dev' preset (Ninja + MSVC).
